Class UpgradeStructureScreen

java.lang.Object
jogo.screens.UpgradeStructureScreen
public class UpgradeStructureScreen extends Object
Controller and view class responsible for rendering structural upgrade paths and statistics comparisons. Displays dynamic data matrix grids comparing current properties with prospective tier outputs, and handles in-place visual updates upon successful backend engine upgrades.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Constructor Details

    • UpgradeStructureScreen

      public UpgradeStructureScreen(javafx.stage.Stage stage, GameSession session, Runnable onUpdateMap)
      Constructs an operational structure upgrade panel framework view.
      Parameters:
      stage - The auxiliary Stage context window framework.
      session - The master engine GameSession instance tracking global variables.
      onUpdateMap - A callback payload layout task triggered to re-render the parent grid interface.

  • Method Details

    • createScene

      public javafx.scene.Scene createScene(int x, int y)
      Builds and structures baseline sub-panels components, handles runtime query exceptions safely, and maps node elements inside an optimized viewport Scene bounds.
      Parameters:
      x - The target horizontal matrix map tile alignment coordinate.
      y - The target vertical matrix map tile alignment coordinate.
      Returns:
      A compiled JavaFX Scene representing the upgrade comparative terminal dashboard.
